task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for LG C2 65" OLED TV (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $1899.00 and wholesale is $1329.00. Product features: 4K OLED TV with perfect blacks and Dolby Vision IQ. Reference: https://www.lg.com/us/tvs/lg-oled65c2pua-oled-4k-tv

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for LG C2 65" OLED TV. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying LG C2 65" OLED TV. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
